name: git_checkpoint
description: Stage all changes and create a checkpoint commit in a git repository within the session's workspace. Returns the commit hash and summary, or '(nothing to commit)' if the working tree is clean. Use this when you've finished a task or want to save progress before continuing.

message.description: Commit message describing what was accomplished (e.g. 'feat: implement X', 'fix: resolve Y').

workdir.description: Path to the git repository relative to the session directory (e.g. 'playground/nutshell'). Defaults to the session directory itself if empty.
